articles.title: Humans Didn't Come From Just One Place—Here's the New Story
articles.summary: Scientists found that early humans mixed across Africa for hundreds of thousands of years. A new DNA study from the Nama people shows our family tree is more like a tangled web.

articles.title: T. Rex Bones Still Have Blood Vessels—And They Tell a Story
articles.summary: Scientists found preserved blood vessels inside a T. rex rib. The dinosaur, named Scotty, had a broken rib that was healing, and the blood vessels show how it survived.

articles.title: Astronomers May Have Found a Brand New Kind of Space Explosion
articles.summary: A weird cosmic event called AT2025ulz might be a 'superkilonova'—a collision of two tiny neutron stars inside a supernova. It could explain how gold and other heavy elements are made.
